Bash(bd create "Set up Deno project structure" --description "Set up the Deno repository with the project structure as defined in CLI_PLAN.md:
- src/commands/ \(config.ts, auth.ts, discover.ts, call.ts, pipeline.ts, query.ts, help.ts\)
- src/lib/ \(api-client.ts, output.ts, config-store.ts\)
- src/concepts/ \(services.json, pipelines.json, patterns.json, queries.json\)
- src/main.ts
- deno.json
- README.md

Use Cliffy CLI framework. Set up basic project configuration.")
